budget_days.promptDays: Budget is {budget}K, daily rate is {dailyRate}. How many days can you cover?
budget_days.promptMonths: Budget is {budget}K, daily rate is {dailyRate}. How many months can you cover?
budget_days.hintMonths: days = budget ÷ daily rate; then ÷ 30 for months

speed_time.promptHours: A car travels at {speed} km/h. How long (in hours) to cover {distance} km?
speed_time.promptMinutes: A car travels at {speed} km/h. How long (in minutes) to cover {distance} km?

conversion_h_min.prompt: How many minutes are in {hours} hours?
